betOfDay.analysis: Nuggets hit the road to face the Lakers in what should be a competitive Western Conference matchup. Denver has been one of the more consistent teams against the spread this season, especially on the road. Jokic makes this team extremely tough to bet against. Lakers have shown vulnerabilities at home. Taking the better team at a small number.

picks.reasoning: 76ers are a much better team than the Nets and playing at home. Maxey and Embiid should handle Brooklyn comfortably. -9 is a decent number for a team with this much talent disparity.
Heat are solid at home and the Magic are still a developing team. Butler being back gives Miami another scoring option. Take the Heat to cover at home.

Nuggets are the defending champs and have the best player in the world in Jokic. Small road favorite is the right number for this matchup. Lakers have been inconsistent and Denver's depth wins this one.

research.nba: Saturday slate features 7 NBA games. Our top picks: Nuggets -2.5 @ Lakers (⭐ TOP PICK), 76ers -9 vs Nets, Heat -3.5 vs Magic. Solid 3-card with our best write on the defending champs on the road.
research.nhl: Saturday NHL features 12 games. Check back later for evening card.
